title: ribes spicatum subsp. spicatum
intro: Ribes spicatum subsp. spicatum, also known as the redcurrant or alpine currant, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the currant family (Grossulariaceae). The medicinal properties of Ribes spicatum subsp. spicatum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and polyphenols. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ribes spicatum subsp. spicatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
